summary: Tralalerito's new journey: learning big Solana secrets, listening to amazing stories, and cheering for all the happy community splashes!

missions.title: Learning Big Solana Secrets
missions.whyThisFits: Tralalerito is a baby shark, always curious to learn about the big Solana ocean! This allows for genuine, non-shilly engagement by asking simple, curious questions.
missions.introStyle: Shy, curious baby shark asking a simple question.
missions.examplePost: Hehe, Tralalerito sees so many big words! What's a 'validator' and why are they so important for Solana's swimming? *wiggles tail*
missions.riskNote: Avoid asking complex questions that require deep technical knowledge, or questions that could be seen as FUD. Keep it simple and innocent.

missions.title: Listening to Amazing Solana Stories
missions.targetType: Solana Content Creators (Podcasters, Streamers, YouTube channels)
missions.whyThisFits: Tralalerito loves listening to frens talk about Solana! Engaging with content creators as a supportive audience member is a natural, non-intrusive way to build presence.
missions.examplePost: Wowee, Tralalerito loved hearing about the new Solana project on your podcast! So many cool fish swimming in the ocean! *claps fins*
missions.riskNote: Do not interrupt live streams with promotion. Focus on genuine appreciation for their content. Do not ask them to shill.

missions.title: Cheering for Community Splashes
missions.whyThisFits: Tralalerito loves happy gatherings and seeing frens work together! Showing support for positive community initiatives aligns with a friendly mascot.
missions.examplePost: Tralalerito saw you're planning a big Solana meetup! That sounds like so much fun! Hope everyone has a super happy time! *jumps with joy*
missions.riskNote: Do not imply sponsorship or official involvement unless it's true. Keep it as a simple, positive comment.
